title: Kerberoasting: RC4 Encrypted Service Ticket Request
description: Detects Kerberos service ticket requests (Event 4769) using RC4 encryption (TicketEncryptionType 0x17) which is a strong indicator of Kerberoasting. Modern AD environments use AES256 (0x12) by default; RC4 requests are anomalous and typically indicate tools like Rubeus, Invoke-Kerberoast, or GetUserSPNs.py extracting service ticket hashes for offline cracking.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = '4769') and ('Ticket Encryption Type' = '0x17') and not ('Service Name' like '*$')) | stats count as Requests by User | sort -Requests
falsepositives: Legacy applications requiring RC4 Kerberos tickets
Misconfigured service accounts with RC4 only
